dependencies.name: football-data.org
dependencies.purpose: Live and scheduled football match feeds, competition schedules, and historical match synchronization into the local warehouse.

dependencies.name: TheSportsDB
dependencies.purpose: Supplementary football event schedules and season event synchronization for the local warehouse.

dependencies.name: OpenWeather One Call API 3.0
dependencies.purpose: Weather context and severity adjustment for upcoming fixture forecasts and simulation drag terms.

notes: Live source coverage depends on configured API keys, provider plans, and network availability.
Keep THIRD_PARTY_CREDITS.md aligned with this manifest whenever the live data stack changes.
